properties.name: Cachoeira Seca Indigenous Territory
properties.subtitle: Pará, Brazil — ancestral land of the Arara people
properties.role: Probable cattle origin. 733,000 ha Indigenous territory. 1,400 ha lost to illegal ranching in 2024 alone — the highest single-year loss of any Indigenous territory in the Amazon.

properties.name: JBS Slaughterhouse, Marabá
properties.subtitle: Pará, Brazil
properties.role: Named in HRW 'Tainted' (2025) as receiving cattle laundered through intermediate farms from Cachoeira Seca and Terra Nossa. Hide value at slaughter: ~$23 USD.

properties.name: Durlicouros Tannery, Xinguara
properties.subtitle: Pará, Brazil
properties.role: LWG Gold certified. 1M+ hides/year. Hides enter chrome drum with 400+ others — individual animal identity is destroyed here.

properties.name: Donskoy Ore Processing Plant, Khromtau
properties.subtitle: Kazakhstan — 'chromium city'
properties.role: Kazakhstan produces ~30% of world chromite. Hexavalent chromium groundwater contamination documented. This chromium cross-links with the collagen in the hide.

properties.name: BASF Verbund, Ludwigshafen
properties.subtitle: Rhine Valley, Germany
properties.role: Azo dye producing the red. Supplemented by Trumpler / TFL fatliquoring agents made nearby — ingredients include Norwegian/Namibian fish oil and Indonesian/Malaysian palm-oil esters.

properties.name: Midori Auto Leather, Yamagata
properties.subtitle: Yamagata Prefecture, Japan
properties.role: Wet-blue hides arrive from Brazil via Yokohama port. Retanned, dyed, fatliquored, cut into seat panels. 35% of each hide falls as waste.

properties.name: Delta Kogyo, Fuchu-cho
properties.subtitle: Hiroshima, Japan
properties.role: Seat covers stitched over steel frame (JFE Steel, Fukuyama). Seat value: ~$275. Delivered JIT — ~4 hours to Mazda.

properties.name: Mazda Ujina Plant No. 1
properties.subtitle: Hiroshima Bay reclaimed peninsula
properties.role: Sole global production site for the MX-5 ND. From this point forward, the seat's provenance is logged against VIN, workstation, shift, timestamp.

properties.name: Pittsburgh
properties.subtitle: Driver's seat, VIN JM1NDAA72L0419158
properties.role: Total distance traveled by materials: ~23,000 km from Pará to Pittsburgh. MSRP in 2020: $32,670. Hide share of price: 0.07%.
